title: Device(headset) is successfully registered to Cloud
scenario: Headset appears in Poly Lens Cloud inventory after pairing via the Poly Lens app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Lens app with no headsets connected.
2. Navigate to Poly Lens Menu > General > Account.
4. Check the Lens server inventory page — the device list should show only the Mobile app (no headsets).
5. Pair a new headset with the app via the Poly Studio Mobile app.
6. Refresh the Lens Cloud inventory page.
7. Verify the newly paired headset appears on the inventory list.
expected: The newly paired headset appears on the Lens Cloud inventory list alongside the Mobile app entry.
